title: Anime Sky
description: Anime Sky is an add-on that brings HD anime-style skies with vibrant clouds and lighting, compatible with other resource pack
body:
Anime Sky is a texture pack that transforms your Minecraft skies into stunning anime-style visuals. Featuring vibrant colors, dreamy clouds, and immersive lighting, it brings a cinematic and artistic touch to your world. It's performance-friendly and works with any resource pack. Elevate your gameplay with the ultimate anime sky experience!!

> required fabricskyboxes or optifine
